AboutSection.intro:
I combine development with product thinking.
I understand user needs and translate them into solutions that
work – technically and business-wise.

specializations.title: End-to-end development
specializations.description: I build apps from UX/UI design and integrations, all the way to deployment and monitoring.

specializations.title: Logic, Data & Performance
specializations.description: I design scalable apps with seamless state, stable APIs, and high performance.

specializations.title: Performance & UX
specializations.description: I design scalable apps with seamless state management, stable APIs, and high performance.

specializations.title: Analysis & Product Thinking
specializations.description: I decode business goals and align with users to transform complexity into clean, simple solutions.

AboutSection.workBio1: I develop applications through their entire lifecycle — from frontend architecture and integrations with APIs and AI models, to final deployment. My experience spans working with extensive commercial systems as well as implementing internal tools that streamline business processes.
AboutSection.workBio2: I look at a product through the eyes of the user, not just the developer. I work primarily with <accent>React</accent>, <accent>Next.js</accent>, and <accent>TypeScript</accent>, but I move smoothly across the <green>backend</green> and <green>databases</green> — allowing me to seamlessly translate complex system logic into intuitive interfaces.
AboutSection.ctaSubtitle: Interested in working together? See the complete overview of my professional experience.
